import type { Theme } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";

export const everforestTheme: Theme = {
  border: {
    color: "#7a8478",
    focusColor: "#d699b6",
    style: "rounded",
  },
  colors: {
    accent: "#d699b6",
    accentForeground: "#2d353b",
    background: "#2d353b",
    border: "#7a8478",
    error: "#e67e80",
    errorForeground: "#2d353b",
    focusRing: "#d699b6",
    foreground: "#d3c6aa",
    info: "#83c092",
    infoForeground: "#2d353b",
    muted: "#1f252a",
    mutedForeground: "#7a8478",
    primary: "#a7c080",
    primaryForeground: "#2d353b",
    secondary: "#373e44",
    secondaryForeground: "#d3c6aa",
    selection: "#a7c080",
    selectionForeground: "#2d353b",
    success: "#a7c080",
    successForeground: "#2d353b",
    warning: "#e69875",
    warningForeground: "#2d353b",
  },
  name: "everforest",
  spacing: {
    0: 0,
    1: 1,
    2: 2,
    3: 3,
    4: 4,
    6: 6,
    8: 8,
  },
  typography: {
    base: "",
    bold: true,
    lg: "bold",
    sm: "dim",
    xl: "bold",
  },
};
